# Contributing to VereinsManagementTool (VMT)

First off, thank you for considering contributing to VMT! It's people like you that make VMT such a great tool.

## How Can I Contribute?

### Reporting Bugs
*   Check the [issue tracker](https://github.com/DavidSchuchert/VereinsManagementTool-Laravel/issues) to see if the bug has already been reported.
*   If not, [open a new issue](https://github.com/DavidSchuchert/VereinsManagementTool-Laravel/issues/new). Be as detailed as possible.

### Suggesting Enhancements
*   Open a new issue and describe the feature you would like to see.

### Pull Requests
1.  Fork the repo and create your branch from `main`.
2.  If you've added code that should be tested, add tests.
3.  Ensure the test suite passes.
4.  Make sure your code lints.
5.  Issue that pull request!

## Styleguide

### PHP
*   Follow [PSR-12](https://www.php-fig.org/psr/psr-12/) coding standards.
*   Use type hints wherever possible.

### Git Commit Messages
*   Use the imperative mood ("Fix bug" not "Fixed bug").
*   Limit the first line to 72 characters or less.

---
*By contributing, you agree that your contributions will be licensed under its MIT License.*
